Video.summary: Cesar's English adventure ends with an aggressive Klee Kai, a collie mix that hates walks, and a hyper Labrador.
Video.title: Battle of Britain

Video.summary: Cesar helps owners of rescue dogs including a terrier mix that screams and a Belgian Tervuren scared of her own home; Cesar helps a family adopting their first dog.
Video.title: Hounds From Hell

Video.summary: At an army base, Cesar helps an Australian shepherd scared of men in uniform and a Shetland shepherd who barks non-stop when planes fly overhead.
Video.title: Army Brats

Video.summary: A Pointer mix is fixated on pine cones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner.
Video.title: High Anxiety

Video.summary: Problem dogs in the U.K. including two dogs that spent most of their lives in Africa, and a barking Jack Russell terrier mix.
Video.title: Cesar Conquers London

Video.summary: Cesar brings discipline to four chaotic Chinese crested dogs, an over-energetic mastiff mix and two unruly miniature dachshunds.
Video.title: Jersey Shore Dogs

Video.summary: Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.
Video.title: Home-Wrecking Hounds

Video.summary: Cesar helps Melody and Tom, who is so terrified of dogs that he will even leave a job site if one is near, deal with their fears and anxieties.
Video.title: Hounded By Fear

Video.summary: Cesar helps two former gang members through Homeboy Industries, an outreach program designed to break the cycle of gang violence but who have problem dogs at home.
Video.title: Homeboys and Hounds

Video.summary: Young fans Jessica and Rachel join Cesar as he deals with a tiny dog with an outsized personality and a nervous pit bull mix afraid of the sea.
Video.title: Pack Leaders in Training

Video.summary: A human psychologist calls Cesar for help when her pet pug and pet pig fight; an emotionally scarred German shepherd.
Video.title: Pig vs. Pug

Video.summary: A dog with a dark side has a knack for stalking and killing small animals; a poodle chases cars; a bulldog has an adverse reaction to skateboarders.
Video.title: Devil Dog

Video.summary: A family deals with a stray dog who bites; Daisy Fuentes has trouble controlling her English bulldog.
Video.title: Boyfriend and Alfie

Video.summary: A rescued dog is too ferocious; an insane Great Dane upsets a household; playing matchmaker for a lonely but picky boxer.
Video.title: Doggie Jekyll & Hyde

Video.summary: Cesar helps Caper, a miniature Doberman rescue dog whose never been trained and Julius, a pit bull who is scared of everything.
Video.title: Caper and Julius

Video.summary: Cesar has his hands full with a Labrador that is obsessed with water and a Chihuahua with a penchant for biting legs.
Video.title: Raging Bandit

Video.summary: A 12-year-old beagle mix displays unpredictable aggression; a couple tries to fit an aggressive puppy into their family.
Video.title: Alice and J

Video.summary: An owner worries that her Doberman suffers from separation anxiety; a yellow lab has a problem with biting.
Video.title: Sunshine and Teddy

Video.summary: A couple fear their border terrier is untrainable; an excitable English bulldog causes trouble for its owner.
Video.title: Bella and Jordan

Video.summary: Cesar helps a Rottweiler who has suffered a lifetime of abuse adjust to her new life after finally finding a loving home.
Video.title: Nicki

Video.summary: A terrier rescued via the Internet is a handful to manage and bites anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters; pit bull problems.
Video.title: Percy and Justice

Video.summary: When Linda tries to walk Jake, he goes mad to protect her; Chantel wants to walk her 150-pound Rottweiler King.
Video.title: Jake and King

Video.summary: A herding dog likes to bite the noses of horses; a family struggles with a dog who runs out the door as soon as it is opened.
Video.title: Daisy and Sophie

Video.summary: A wheelchair-bound owner wants to keep her German shepherd Shep in line; Sasha, the Lhasa apso, must learn who's boss.
Video.title: Shep and Sasha

Video.summary: Cesar helps Lucy, an odd Dalmatian who is affectionate one minute and angry the next and Lizzie who is obsessed with running all the time.
Video.title: Lucy and Lizzie

Video.summary: Scrawny is the favorite dog in his household, but popularity has gone to his head; Lola the Dalmatian is spoiled.
Video.title: Scrawny and Lola

Video.summary: Pets abandoned during Hurricane Katrina reunite with their owners or find new homes; a pit bull behaves aggressively toward the dog of his owner's new girlfriend; a large dog has pica.
Video.title: Hurricane Hounds (Part 1)

Video.summary: A family's German shepherd will only listen to one person; a Brittany spaniel becomes aggressive around female dogs.
Video.title: Pepsi and Goldie

Video.summary: A dog barks all the time and might pose a threat to children; a beagle mix has lots of strange behaviors.
Video.title: Buddy and Stewart

Video.summary: British problem dogs including wild German Shepherds, a dog that must be muzzled by court order, and an English cocker spaniel that hates cars.
Video.title: London Calling

Video.summary: Cesar travels to the U.K. to help troubled dog owners with a territorial street dog and a Dalmatian whose personality can turn ugly.
Video.title: Horrible Hounds of the U.K.
